description_long: This is a pair of classic rectangular sunglasses with a full-rim frame and dark tinted lenses. The frame is thick and robust, with a smooth, glossy finish and a slightly curved brow line. The temples are straight and wide, featuring a subtle taper towards the ear tips and a visible brand logo printed in white on the outer side. The lenses are uniformly dark, providing strong sun protection and a sleek, modern look. The bridge is a simple, integrated saddle style, seamlessly connecting the two lenses. Overall, the design is timeless and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of rectangular, full-rim sunglasses with dark lenses and thick, glossy black frames featuring a visible brand logo on the temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim frame, and dark lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick temple with a visible brand logo and the smooth curve of the frame.
description_view_2: Top-down front view emphasizing the lens tint and the even thickness of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple with brand detailing and the overall frame curvature.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight temples and a slightly curved brow line. The frame is robust and smooth, with no additional embellishments except for the brand logo.
attribute_lens_tint: Uniformly dark gray tint, providing high opacity and sun protection with no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated saddle bridge, smoothly connecting the two lenses without separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick and straight with a gentle taper at the ends, featuring a printed brand logo in white on the outer side. No additional patterns or engravings are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A printed brand logo is visible on the outer side of both temples in white, featuring a recognizable script style.
